subject: Your invoice #4821 is due
body: Hi, your invoice #4821 for $1,200 is due on the 15th. Please pay via the portal.

subject: Can we meet next week?
body: Hi, could we find 30 minutes next week to discuss the roadmap? Let me know what works.

subject: 50% off all courses - today only!
body: Flash sale! Get 50% off every course. Offer ends at midnight. Shop now.

subject: Weekly newsletter: 5 AI trends
body: This week in AI: agents, RAG, evals, and more. Read the full roundup on our site.

subject: URGENT: production is down
body: The payments service is returning 500s in production. We need someone to look immediately.

subject: Lunch on Saturday?
body: Hi honey, are you free for lunch this Saturday? Let me know. Love, Mom.

subject: Your package has shipped
body: Your order #99213 has shipped and will arrive Thursday. Track it here.

subject: Q3 planning doc for review
body: Please review the attached Q3 planning doc and add your comments by Friday.
